requirements.text: Multi-source fetching (GitHub, Product Hunt, Hacker News)
Supplementary sources (awesome lists, high-star low-fork repos)
Signal gate — star growth velocity over raw count
Signal gate — repo age weighting (young repos prioritized)
requirements.evidence: US-2: 'Prioritizes young repos over mature ones gaining stars'

requirements.text: Signal gate — contributor diversity as novelty signal
requirements.evidence: US-2: 'Weighs first-time contributor count as a novelty signal'

requirements.text: Retain signal metrics for later correlation

requirements.evidence: US-4: 'Pipeline stages are independently configurable'; F-7

requirements.text: Reports saved to reports/ directory as markdown knowledge base
Scheduled execution via cron or runner
Idempotent runs — no duplicate reports on re-run
requirements.evidence: §5 NFR states this; F-18 exists at P2 but should be P1

requirements.text: 'Why it matters', 'why now', larger shift analysis
requirements.evidence: Sections 2, 3, 9 cover implicitly; no explicit 'why now' prompt in template

requirements.text: Search across reports by keyword, date, source
Cost transparency (token usage, estimated cost per run)
requirements.evidence: US-7; F-13 — PRD exceeds vision here, not a gap

requirements.text: Standardized structure enabling comparison over time

gaps.requirement: 'Why now' as explicit analytical lens in report template
Idempotent runs — F-18 deprioritized to P2 but §5 NFR requires it
